math-24.mathml: <m:math><m:mrow><m:mrow><m:mrow><m:mrow><m:msub><m:mi>w</m:mi><m:mrow><m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="false">∥ </m:mo></m:mrow></m:mrow></m:msub><m:mo stretchy="false">=</m:mo><m:mi mathvariant="italic">w</m:mi><m:mspace width="0.25em"/></m:mrow><m:mtext>sin</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.25em"/><m:mo stretchy="false">(</m:mo><m:mtext>25ƒ</m:mtext><m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="false">)</m:mo><m:mo stretchy="false">=</m:mo><m:mrow><m:mi mathvariant="italic">mg</m:mi><m:mspace width="0.25em"/></m:mrow></m:mrow><m:mtext>sin</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.25em"/><m:mo stretchy="false">(</m:mo><m:mtext>25º</m:mtext><m:mo stretchy="false">)</m:mo></m:mrow></m:mrow></m:mrow></m:math>

math-25.mathml: <m:math><m:mrow><m:mrow><m:mrow><m:mrow><m:msub><m:mi>w</m:mi><m:mrow><m:mo>⊥</m:mo></m:mrow></m:msub><m:mo stretchy="false">=</m:mo><m:mi mathvariant="italic">w</m:mi><m:mspace width="0.25em"/></m:mrow><m:mtext>cos</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.25em"/><m:mo stretchy="false">(</m:mo><m:mtext>25º</m:mtext><m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="false">)</m:mo><m:mo stretchy="false">=</m:mo><m:mrow><m:mi mathvariant="italic">mg</m:mi><m:mspace width="0.25em"/></m:mrow></m:mrow><m:mtext>cos</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.25em"/><m:mo stretchy="false">(</m:mo><m:mtext>25º</m:mtext><m:mo stretchy="false">)</m:mo></m:mrow></m:mrow></m:mrow></m:math>

math-30.mathml:
<m:math>
   
    <m:mrow>
     <m:mrow>
  
         <m:msub>
          <m:mi>a</m:mi>
          <m:mrow>
           <m:mrow>
            <m:mo stretchy="false">∥ </m:mo>
           </m:mrow>
          </m:mrow>
         </m:msub>
         <m:mo stretchy="false">=</m:mo>
         <m:mfrac>
          <m:msub>
           <m:mi>F</m:mi>
           <m:mrow>
            <m:mrow>
             <m:mtext>net </m:mtext>
             <m:mo stretchy="false">∥ </m:mo>
            </m:mrow>
           </m:mrow>
          </m:msub>
          <m:mi>m</m:mi>
         </m:mfrac>
         <m:mo stretchy="false">=</m:mo>
         <m:mfrac>
          <m:mrow>
           <m:mstyle fontstyle="italic">
            <m:mrow>
             <m:mtext>mg</m:mtext>
            </m:mrow>
           </m:mstyle><m:mspace width="0.25em"/>
           <m:mtext>sin</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.25em"/>
           <m:mo stretchy="false">(</m:mo>
           <m:mtext>25º</m:mtext>
           <m:mo stretchy="false">)</m:mo>
          </m:mrow>
          <m:mi>m</m:mi>
         </m:mfrac>
  
         <m:mo stretchy="false">=</m:mo>
  
         <m:mi>g</m:mi><m:mspace width="0.25em"/>
         <m:mtext>sin</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.25em"/>
         <m:mo stretchy="false">(</m:mo>
         <m:mtext>25º</m:mtext>
         <m:mo stretchy="false">)</m:mo>
  
     </m:mrow>
    </m:mrow>
   
  </m:math>
